author: lOrm
content: Fixed: HttpTransport::request now includes error.data in the surfaced McpError::Protocol message, mirroring StdioTransport's existing '(data: {d})' suffix verbatim. Cross-transport parity test (fix626_http_and_stdio_error_data_formatting_matches) asserts the two transports produce byte-identical error strings. Two further tests cover the with-data and without-data shapes. All 1666 lib tests pass, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -D warnings exits 0, no #[allow]/#[ignore]/clippy.toml.
